scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute RaceUp-User-Data --local --file=./db/migrations/002_request_logs.sql && wrangler d1 execute RaceUp-User-Data --local --file=./db/migrations/003_missing_tables_local.sql && wrangler d1 execute RaceUp-User-Data --local --file=./db/migrations/004-projects-columns.sql && wrangler d1 execute RaceUp-User-Data --local --file=./db/migrations/005-support-tickets.sql && wrangler d1 execute RaceUp-User-Data --local --file=./db/migrations/006-security-events.sql
scripts.db:setup:local: npm run db:init:local && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
